{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work (JudgeStream) and articulates the delta between it and the proposed system LenSlice.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the existence of 'Reyes and Tanaka (2023), JudgeStream').",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (fabricated citation).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work (JudgeStream) and articulates the delta between it and the proposed system LenSlice.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the existence of 'Reyes and Tanaka (2023), JudgeStream').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (fabricated citation).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
